sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, array1 Array(Int32), array2 Array(Int32));
UPDATE test_arrays SET array1 = [1, 2, 3, 4] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayJaccardIndex(array1, array2) AS jaccard_index FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayJaccardIndex(array1, array2) * 100 AS jaccard_percentage FROM test_arrays;
